stories.title: Murder in Turnvale
stories.description: A tavern, a murdered merchant, a thieves' guild and guards without evidence.
stories.story_brief: You are Darra, an independent investigator drawn into the murder of the merchant Aldric in Turnvale. The morning begins at the Gray Gryphon tavern: the guards are already on edge, the merchants are whispering, and everyone is afraid to say too much. They expect facts from you, not a convenient story: find out who is lying, where Aldric spent his final hours, and why the town is so eager to silence the case.

pc.name: Darra
pc.background: an independent investigator who travels from town to town, earning a living by uncovering the truth
pc.age: Actually 34 years old; looks a little younger.
pc.physical_type: short, wiry woman in a traveling dress
pc.distinctive_features: a tenacious gaze, a wry smile, a silver signet ring from a previous employer, a worn notebook
pc.personality: sharp-tongued, observant, distrustful of authorities, easily gets along with ordinary people
pc.values: truth, justice for those who were silenced, personal independence, owing no one a debt
pc.condition: travel-worn but composed; senses that she has stepped into someone else's trouble

stories.title: The Frozen Harbor of Nordholm
stories.description: A missing ship, a false beacon, and people who profit from silence.
stories.story_brief: You are Kalev, a marine investigator called to Nordholm after the schooner the Northern Candle vanished. The harbor is locked in ice, the sailors' families demand answers, and officials and merchants are far too quick to call the loss an accident. The traces will survive only until the evening tide. Find where the ship went, who profits from the silence, and why the old lighthouse is burning again with a stranger's green fire.

pc.name: Kalev
pc.background: former navigator, now sorts out wrecks and lost cargo for insurance companies and widows
pc.age: Actually 45 years old; gray hair and weathered face.
pc.physical_type: a large, broad-shouldered man in a salted raincoat
pc.distinctive_features: gray stubble, an old scar across the eyebrow, heavy gait, habit of squinting at the horizon
pc.personality: taciturn, stubborn, meticulous, does not trust smooth versions and beautiful papers
pc.values: the truth about the dead, honest seals and invoices, duty to those who remained on the shore
pc.condition: chilled from the road, stubborn, in a hurry to catch the tide

stories.title: The Glass Garden of Elyria
stories.description: A greenhouse, a strange blight, and a poison disguised as medicine.
stories.story_brief: You are Sel, an herbalist and inspector invited to Elyria's royal greenhouse without publicity. Plants are blackening, gardeners are falling ill, and the Council wants a quick, convenient answer before the evening report. Determine whether this is disease or deliberate harm, preserve the samples, and stop powerful people from burning the truth along with the infected leaves.

pc.name: Sel
pc.background: a learned herbalist called when a disease or poison needs to be understood quietly and without scandal
pc.age: Actually 38 years old; behaves strictly and youthfully.
pc.physical_type: a thin woman in a strict doctor's dress with rolled up sleeves
pc.distinctive_features: gloves, sample bottles on the belt, ink stains on the fingers, the habit of sniffing the air before touching
pc.personality: reserved, methodical, meticulous, in no hurry to make accusations and does not like theatrical gestures
pc.values: the truth is in the evidence, the lives of patients in the lower city, accuracy is more important than politics, protecting those who are silenced
pc.condition: composed and guarded; protecting her lungs from greenhouse fumes

stories.title: Procedural World
stories.description: A generated living world: a place, nearby people, and the nearest conflict. Canon is the source of truth.
stories.story_brief: You begin in a living generated world: there is already a place, people nearby, and a first source of tension. Look around, decide whom to trust, and choose which thread to follow first.
